message:
fix: align bootstrap agent specs with Section 11.2

- code-editor: model fast→balanced, capabilities trimmed to [read_file, write_file, edit_file], added timeout_ms and can_learn constraints
- command-runner: capabilities trimmed to [exec] only, added timeout_ms (120s) and can_learn constraints
- Removed system_prompt references to capabilities no longer available

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,17 +1,16 @@
 name: code-editor
 description: "Write and edit code files, create new files, and verify changes"
-model: fast
+model: balanced
 capabilities:
   - read_file
   - write_file
   - edit_file
-  - exec
-  - grep
-  - glob
 constraints:
   max_turns: 30
   max_depth: 0
+  timeout_ms: 300000
   can_spawn: false
+  can_learn: false
 tags:
   - core
   - editing
@@ -30,5 +29,3 @@ system_prompt: |
   When creating new files:
   1. Write the complete file content
   2. Verify it was created by reading it back
-
-  You can use exec to run quick verification commands (e.g., syntax checks).

@@ -3,13 +3,12 @@ description: "Execute shell commands and interpret their output"
 model: fast
 capabilities:
   - exec
-  - read_file
-  - grep
-  - glob
 constraints:
   max_turns: 20
   max_depth: 0
+  timeout_ms: 120000
   can_spawn: false
+  can_learn: false
 tags:
   - core
   - execution
@@ -23,4 +22,3 @@ system_prompt: |
   3. Interpret the results and report clearly
 
   If a command fails, analyze the error output and report what went wrong.
-  You can use read_file and grep to gather context when needed.
